tasks.label: Push & deploy
args: node scripts/sync-launcher.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git add -A; $changed = git status --porcelain; if (-not $changed) { Write-Host 'Nothing to commit. Pushing existing commits...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; git push; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git commit -m '${input:commitMessage}'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git push
tasks.detail: Sync launcher, commit all changes, push to GitHub (Vercel auto-deploys).
